- Add Node.js v22+ requirement and nvm installation
- Document Homebrew requirement for skills
- Add Bun installation and usage guide
- Document build process issues and solutions
- Add complete WSL setup checklist
- List outstanding issues as TODO checklist

Issues documented:
- Permission errors with pnpm on WSL Windows mounts
- Node version mismatch \(v20 vs v22 requirement\)
- Skills blocked by missing Homebrew
- Homebrew network/DNS failures during installation
- Gateway not detecting Homebrew PATH without restart
- Build errors from missing dependencies
- Package manager confusion \(pnpm vs bun\)
